markdown:
#  Payments Beneficiary Approver Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Approve a Beneficiary Bank Accounts 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Beneficiaries** tab.
  3. Locate the beneficiary and click **Manage**.
  4. Review the beneficiary's information for accuracy:
     * **Directory Record**. Shows the beneficiary's information in the company record of the Directory tool. See [Add a Company to the Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/add-a-company-to-the-company-directory).
     * **Company Profile**. Shows the beneficiary's profile information as the beneficiary submitted it. See [Set Up Procore Pay as a Payee](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-setup-guide/request-the-pay-tool-as-an-invoice-contact).
     * **Bank Account**. This is the bank account number for payments submitted by the beneficiary. 
#####  Note
**What if the information in the Directory Record and Company Record are different?** If the information submitted by the beneficiary is different from the information in the Directory tool, Procore recommends contacting the beneficiary to determine if your Procore Administrator needs to make an address change in their company record. To learn more, see [Edit a Company in the Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/edit-a-company-in-the-company-directory).
  5. If the information is correct, click **Approve for Payment**.


This sets the account's status to 'Approved', enabling it to receive payments through Procore Pay.
[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payments-beneficiary-approver-guide/set-up-mfa-for-procore-pay/)

description: This guides shows the payor's designated beneficiary approver how to set up their Procore user account to approve beneficiary bank accounts. | Approve a Beneficiary Bank Accounts
